prompt: Assess lifecycle state, percent complete, defects, and remaining work.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is E-102 Panelboard installation & makeup within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.1 Power Distribution. The observed field condition is: no panel schedule. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors NEC Art. 408, 110.26 (working clearance), 200.4. Treat this as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.
title: T1 E-102 Progress assessment
